name: IGGT_official
description: [ICLR'26] IGGT: Instance-Grounded Geometry Transformer for Semantic 3D Reconstruction
readme_summary: IGGT is a Python-based framework for semantic 3D reconstruction, utilizing an Instance-Grounded Geometry Transformer to learn 3D features grounded in instance-level understanding. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks like ScanNet and InsScene-15K with efficient inference.
key_features: State-of-the-art performance on ScanNet and InsScene-15K
primary_use_case: Semantic 3D reconstruction from images, enabling instance-level understanding of geometric structures.
cover_image_prompt: A digital sculptor meticulously chiseling away at a block of raw geometric data, revealing a detailed 3D model of a room with distinct objects. The sculptor uses a 'transformer' tool that glows with instance-specific colors, highlighting individual furniture pieces and architectural elements. Input images float like blueprints around the sculptor, feeding into the transformer. Small, subtle UI elements showing segmentation masks and 3D coordinates are visible on a nearby holographic display. The scene is set in a clean, modern workshop with soft, focused lighting, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a palette of cool blues and warm oranges, emphasizing clarity and precision.

name: jolt
description: ⚡️A terminal-based battery and energy monitor for macOS and Linux.
readme_summary: Jolt is a terminal-based battery and energy monitor for macOS and Linux. It provides real-time insights into power consumption, process energy usage, and battery health, with features like historical graphs and a background daemon for data collection.
key_features: Battery Status (Charge percentage, time remaining, health, cycle count)
Power Monitoring (System power draw with CPU/GPU breakdown)
Process Tracking (Processes sorted by energy impact)
primary_use_case: Monitoring and managing battery and energy consumption on macOS and Linux systems through a terminal interface.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl perched on a laptop, holding a magnifying glass over the laptop's battery icon, which is glowing with intricate energy patterns. The owl's eyes subtly display real-time graphs and process lists. Below the laptop, a small, stylized tree grows, its roots representing historical data and its leaves showing current power draw. Digital energy wisps flow from the laptop towards the owl, symbolizing data analysis. The scene is set in a cozy, dimly lit study, with subtle code snippets floating in the background. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and a warm, informative color palette.

name: openchatbi
description: OpenChatBI is an intelligent chat-based BI tool powered by large language models, designed to help users query, analyze, and visualize data through natural language conversations. It uses LangGraph and LangChain to build chat agent and workflows that support natural language to SQL conversion and data analysis.
readme_summary: OpenChatBI is an open-source, AI-powered business intelligence tool that allows users to query, analyze, and visualize data through natural language conversations. It leverages LangGraph and LangChain to build intelligent chat agents capable of converting natural language to SQL and performing complex data analysis.
primary_use_case: Enabling users to interact with and analyze data using natural language conversations, abstracting away the complexity of SQL and data querying.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot librarian is sitting at a large, ornate wooden desk. In front of the robot is a stack of ancient, dusty tomes (representing raw data). The robot is holding a glowing, magical quill, and with a smile, it's writing on a blank scroll. As it writes, the scroll transforms into a vibrant, interactive 3D data visualization of a growing bar chart and a line graph. Subtle digital particles flow from the books to the quill and then to the visualization. The repository name 'OpenChatBI' is subtly etched into the desk. The scene is set in a cozy, well-lit study with a hint of futuristic technology. The art style should be a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration with rich textures and a clear focus on the transformation.

name: PairTranslate
description: 开源的沉浸式翻译，支持选段/查词/选词翻译 | Open-source immersive translation, supporting segment/word lookup and selection translation
readme_summary: Pair Translate is a browser extension that provides an immersive translation experience by appending translated text directly to the original web content. It allows users to view both the original and translated versions side-by-side, enhancing comprehension and accessibility for multilingual web browsing.
key_features: Appends translated text to original text for side-by-side viewing
Supports major translation platforms (Google Translate, Bing, DeepL)
Open-source and privacy-focused (local processing, no data collection)
Browser extension for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge
primary_use_case: To provide users with an integrated, side-by-side translation of web page content directly within their browser, enabling seamless understanding of foreign language websites.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously placing translated text, like delicate paper slips, directly beside the original text on ancient, illuminated scrolls. The scrolls represent web pages, with the original text in a classic font and the translated text in a modern, clear font. Subtle digital particles representing data flow emanate from a small, stylized browser window in the corner. The librarian's spectacles glow faintly, symbolizing the AI integration. The scene is set in a cozy, dimly lit study with warm, inviting light. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with rich textures and a focus on clarity, showcasing the 'Pair Translate' name subtly etched on a nearby bookshelf.

name: xleak
description: A fast terminal Excel viewer with an interactive TUI. Features full-text search, formula display, lazy loading for large files, clipboard support, and export to CSV/JSON. Built with Rust and ratatui.
readme_summary: xleak is a fast terminal-based Excel viewer built with Rust and ratatui. It provides an interactive TUI for navigating and searching through spreadsheet data, supporting various Excel and OpenDocument formats, and offering features like lazy loading for large files and data export.
key_features: Beautiful terminal rendering with formatted tables
Interactive TUI mode with keyboard navigation
Multiple export formats (CSV, JSON, plain text)
primary_use_case: Viewing and interacting with Excel spreadsheets directly within the terminal, without needing to open a full spreadsheet application.
cover_image_prompt: A medieval scribe meticulously transcribing ancient scrolls onto a glowing, futuristic tablet screen. The scrolls represent large, complex Excel files, and the tablet displays them in a clean, organized, and interactive format with clear cell boundaries and data types. Subtle digital particles flow from the scrolls to the tablet, symbolizing data transfer and processing. The scribe's tools are a mix of quill pens and modern stylus. The background is a dimly lit library merging into a clean, modern workspace. The overall mood is one of making complex data accessible and manageable. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clear iconography and a balanced color palette.
